sections.paragraph:
verb לעסוק

to deal with, engage in, occupy oneself

verb להתעסק

to deal with, engage in, occupy oneself; handle

verb להתעסק

to have anything to do with; flirt, have an affair with

verb להעסיק

to employ, occupy, keep busy

verb הועסק

be employed

masculine noun

business, shop; matter; concern, affair, affaire; occupation
